title: From Russia with Love
writer: Richard Maibaum, Johanna Harwood, Ian Fleming
actors: Sean Connery, Robert Shaw, Lotte Lenya
plot: James Bond willingly inserts himself into an assassination plot involving a naive Russian beauty in order to retrieve a Soviet encryption device that was stolen by the evil SPECTRE organization.
language: English, Russian, Turkish, French, Romany, Italian
country: United Kingdom, United States, Italy, Turkey
awards: Won 1 BAFTA Award3 wins & 6 nominations total
